company.name: MakeWithUs
company.tagline: Build websites and apps that grow your business
company.description: MakeWithUs is a digital product studio that builds custom websites, web apps, and mobile apps for entrepreneurs, startups, and growing businesses.

services.name: Web Design
services.description: Beautiful, conversion-focused website designs. We design for real users, not just aesthetics.
services.ideal_for: Businesses that need a fresh, modern online presence

services.name: Web Development
services.description: Custom websites built with Next.js, React, and modern tech. Fast, SEO-ready, and scalable.
services.ideal_for: Startups and businesses needing custom functionality

services.name: App Development
services.description: Mobile and web apps built from scratch. iOS, Android, and cross-platform.
services.ideal_for: Founders with a product idea that needs to be built

services.name: E-commerce
services.description: Online stores that sell. Shopify, custom carts, payment integration, and inventory.
services.ideal_for: Brands wanting to sell products online

services.name: SEO
services.description: Get found on Google. On-page SEO, technical SEO, and content strategy.

services.name: UI/UX Design
services.description: User research, wireframes, and high-fidelity prototypes in Figma.
services.ideal_for: Teams building products who need design leadership

pricing.note: Annual plans get 20% discount. Custom project pricing available on request.

process.name: Discovery call
process.description: We understand your goals, audience, and requirements.

process.name: Proposal
process.description: We send a clear scope, timeline, and cost.

process.name: Launch
process.description: We deploy, test, and hand over the keys.

process.name: Support
process.description: Ongoing support available on all plans.

projects.description: Built a full Shopify store for a fashion brand. 3x conversion rate improvement.
Built an analytics dashboard for a B2B SaaS startup.
Designed and built a portfolio for a creative agency.

faqs.q: How long does a website take?
faqs.a: Simple websites take 1-2 weeks. Custom web apps take 4-8 weeks. We'll give you an exact timeline after the discovery call.
Yes! We love working with early-stage founders. We've helped many go from idea to live product.

faqs.q: Can I see examples of your work?
faqs.a: Yes, we have a portfolio section on the website. You can also ask us directly on WhatsApp for case studies.

faqs.q: What if I don't have a design?
faqs.a: No problem. We handle everything from scratch — design, development, and launch.
We offer a revision-based process so you're always happy before we finalise. Contact us to discuss specific concerns.
